rootCauses: Trace/source variants were classified after ordinal memory, so 'last response' selected the last ranked business item.
Trace questions were not consistently marked as meta and could hide the last normal trace.
The Supabase question missed its narrow capability pattern and matched the broad model phrase 'are you using'.
Trading had one generic answer with no list/recommend/status sub-intents or evidence check.
Natural revenue wording and a transcript typo missed narrow money intent patterns.
An internal general-domain diagnostic was allowed to become a normal final answer.

traceHandler.supabaseAmbiguity: answers both last-answer use and general authenticated capability
traceHandler.strategicReasoning: reports local_reasoning/model_reasoning, model use, Supabase use, and reason

tradingHandler.recommendation: withheld because the latest proof report has no recent backtest timestamp or latest strategy report

revenueHandler.supabase: attempted for relevant opportunity tables; success claimed only when a query succeeds

routeDecisionContract: All transcript routes now execute through hermesPriorityRouter and a deny-by-default context packet.
remainingBlockers: Fresh comparable paper backtest evidence before selecting a trading strategy
